duplicates_removed.reason: Same title, visionary version more novel

ideas.title: Circuit Reroute
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Drag wire segments to complete circuits before the power surge reaches the dead end and fries everything.

ideas.title: Gravity Plumber
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Tap to flip gravity direction and guide a falling ball through a maze of pipes — but every flip changes which pipes are open.

ideas.title: Weight Puzzle
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Place weighted blocks on a teetering balance beam to match the target tilt angle — but every block you place changes the physics for the next.

ideas.title: Mirror Logic
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Place and angle mirrors to bounce a laser through targets in the correct ORDER — wrong sequence detonates the bomb.

ideas.title: Domino Plot
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Place dominoes on a board to create a chain reaction that topples ALL targets — but you only get a limited number of pieces.

ideas.title: Gear Train
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Connect gears of different sizes to transfer rotation from the motor to the target wheel — wrong gear ratios jam the machine and explode.

ideas.title: Trash Sort Panic
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Sort garbage into the right bins before your apartment gets condemned.

ideas.title: Password Panic
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Create passwords that satisfy increasingly insane security requirements before you get locked out.

ideas.title: Cable Untangle
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Untangle the nightmare cable drawer before your devices die.

ideas.title: Excuse Engine
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Build absurd excuses by connecting logic fragments before your boss catches you.

ideas.title: Pipe Dream Plumber
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Route water through a house of increasingly insane plumbing before everything floods.

ideas.title: Parking Lot Escape
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Slide cars around a jammed parking lot to free your car before the meter expires.

ideas.title: Num Collapse
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Merge adjacent same-numbers on a hex grid before the board fills up — but merging shifts ALL neighbors, creating chain reactions or disasters.

ideas.title: Shade Sort
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Sort colored liquids between tubes — but you can only see the shades, not the exact colors, and the palette shifts each stage.

ideas.title: Tile Fib
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: One tile in each group is LYING about its value — find the liar by testing sums against target numbers.

ideas.title: Fold Fit
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Fold a flat shape along dotted lines to make it fit perfectly into a 3D silhouette — origami meets Tetris.

ideas.title: Signal Swap
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Swap colored signals on a grid to complete circuits before the board fills up.

ideas.title: Pipe Paradox
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Route flows through pipes where the RULES of flow change every 5 seconds.

ideas.title: Weight Riddle
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Balance a scale by deducing hidden weights from clues — one wrong guess and it topples.

ideas.title: Hex Collapse
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Place numbered hexagons to trigger cascading collapses — but only if the math adds up.

ideas.title: Color Law
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Sort colors into zones — but the sorting RULES change mid-puzzle and you must adapt instantly.

ideas.title: Liar's Grid
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: A puzzle where the numbers on the board LIE to you, and you must figure out which ones are telling the truth.

ideas.title: Fold Logic
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: A puzzle where you fold the screen like origami to make disconnected paths connect.

ideas.title: Echo Maze
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: A maze where you can't see the walls — you tap to send out a sound pulse that briefly reveals them.

ideas.title: Rule Breaker
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: A puzzle game that teaches you rules — then the only way to win is to BREAK them.

ideas.title: Gravity Painter
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: A puzzle where you rotate gravity to make paint balls roll and color every tile on the board.

ideas.title: Time Loop Tile
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: A puzzle where your PAST SELF replays your previous moves, and you must cooperate with your own ghost to solve it.
